changes.value: **File:** `kanban-app/ui/src/components/entity-card.tsx:47,167-169`\n\nReads `schema.entity.body_field` and passes it to SubtaskProgress so it can parse checkboxes from the body. The progress display component should know which field to read from its own configuration (e.g. the compute engine already knows this), not via hardcoded wiring in the card component.
entity-card.tsx: hardcoded body_field for progress rendering
